updates.heading: Open: clarify job-board seniority-label guidance for R&D
bullets: Ashleigh Huffman asked you and Kristin (6/29) whether the passdown to edit seniority labels means removing Senior/Staff/Principal from IC postings, or only from PE/leadership titles (Director, VP, Manager).
Flag: Senior/Staff/Principal on IC roles is impactful to top-of-funnel strategy and comp alignment, and maps to defined internal levels — pod wants confirmation before actioning.
Action: respond with the scope of the seniority-label change for R&D IC reqs.
